Michael Johnson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated and skilled Forklift Operator with over 5 years of experience in warehouse operations. Proficient in operating various types of forklifts, including reach trucks and counterbalance units. Committed to maintaining safety standards and enhancing productivity in fast-paced environments. Experienced in utilizing Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) to streamline operations and improve inventory accuracy.

Experience
Forklift Operator
ABC Logistics, Atlanta, GA
June 2020 - Present
- Operate reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts to load, unload, and transport materials within the warehouse.
- Utilize WMS to track inventory levels and assist in stock rotation, contributing to a 15% increase in efficiency.
- Conduct daily safety inspections of equipment and adhere to OSHA guidelines, ensuring a safe working environment.
- Collaborate with team members to meet tight deadlines and maintain high productivity levels.

Forklift Operator
XYZ Distribution, Atlanta, GA
March 2018 - May 2020
- Managed the operation of forklifts to move products in a high-volume distribution center.
- Trained new employees on safe forklift operation and warehouse safety protocols.
- Assisted in inventory management through WMS, helping to reduce discrepancies by 20%.
- Implemented safety measures that resulted in zero accidents during tenure.

Certifications
- OSHA Class I/IV/V Forklift Certification
- Forklift Safety and Operations Training
